title: Player
description: A football player. Required fields are id and name; every other field is optional and components must handle missing values.

id.description: Stable identifier for this player within the data source. Not assumed to be globally unique across sources.

name.description: Display name. May be full or short form. Unicode and multi-script names must be supported.

photo_url.description: Optional portrait photo URL. Components must fall back to initials if null or unreachable.

club_id.description: Optional club identifier matching a Club.id.

nation.description: Optional ISO 3166 alpha-3 country code (e.g. FRA, BRA, ENG).

position.description: Optional position label. Free-form, provider-dependent (e.g. 'Att Mid/Winger', 'LB', 'CF').

age.description: Age in years at the reference date.

minutes.description: Total minutes played in the reference period.
